# Governance

raster_runtime is maintained by Ray-D-Song for the Raster project.

This fork is expected to diverge from upstream LLRT. Upstream changes may be
reviewed and synchronized manually when they are useful for Raster. Some
upstream changes may be skipped when they do not match Raster's runtime goals.

Project decisions, releases, and security handling are managed by the
maintainer listed in [MAINTAINERS.md](MAINTAINERS.md).
